violations.description: INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): The building containing the food service was noted with a structure which would allow the entrance of insects and/ or rodents. Rear screen door has large hole in screen and above door frame.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of bread yeast was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in kitchen noted not clean.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded in kitchen.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted not clean. Bakery storage rack handles and exteriors has heavy debris build up.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Homestyle coolers noted with no thermometer.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Interior surfaces of proofing cabinet and dough storage cabinet not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted in need of detail cleaning.
